<block_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64UF
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 2,  fcvt.h.w,                   2.0,  2);
  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 3,  fcvt.h.w,                  -2.0, -2);

  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 4, fcvt.h.wu,                   2.0,  2);
  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 5, fcvt.h.wu,               0h:7c00, -2);

#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 6,  fcvt.h.l,                   2.0,  2);
  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 7,  fcvt.h.l,                  -2.0, -2);

  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 8, fcvt.h.lu,                   2.0,  2);
  TEST_INT_FP_OP_H( 9, fcvt.h.lu,               0h:7c00, -2);
#endif

  TEST_FCVT_H_S( 10, -1.5, -1.5)

#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_FCVT_H_D( 11, -1.5, -1.5)
<block_end>

<block_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64UF
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

<block_end>
<task>minf: .float -Inf</task><asm><eof_func>

<task>three: .float 3.0</task><asm>
RVTEST_DATA_END
<eof_func>

#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64UF
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  TEST_CASE(2, a1, 1, csrwi fcsr, 1; li a0, 0x1234; fssr a1, a0)
  TEST_CASE(3, a0, 0x34, frsr a0)
  TEST_CASE(4, a0, 0x14, frflags a0)
  TEST_CASE(5, a0, 0x01, csrrwi a0, frm, 2)
  TEST_CASE(6, a0, 0x54, frsr a0)
  TEST_CASE(7, a0, 0x14, csrrci a0, fflags, 4)
  TEST_CASE(8, a0, 0x50, frsr a0)

#define TEST_FSGNJS(n, insn, new_sign, rs1_sign, rs2_sign) \
  TEST_CASE(n, a0, 0x1234 | (-(new_sign) << 15), \
  li a1, ((rs1_sign) << 15) | 0x1234; \
  li a2, -(rs2_sign); \
  fmv.h.x f1, a1; \
  fmv.h.x f2, a2; \
  insn f0, f1, f2; \
  fmv.x.h a0, f0)

  TEST_FSGNJS(10, fsgnj.h, 0, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(11, fsgnj.h, 1, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(12, fsgnj.h, 0, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(13, fsgnj.h, 1, 1, 1)

  TEST_FSGNJS(20, fsgnjn.h, 1, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(21, fsgnjn.h, 0, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(22, fsgnjn.h, 1, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(23, fsgnjn.h, 0, 1, 1)

  TEST_FSGNJS(30, fsgnjx.h, 0, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(31, fsgnjx.h, 1, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(32, fsgnjx.h, 1, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(33, fsgnjx.h, 0, 1, 1)

  TEST_PASSFAIL

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

RVTEST_DATA_END

<fim_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64UF
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 2,  fcvt.w.h, 0x01,         -1,    -1.1, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 3,  fcvt.w.h, 0x00,         -1,    -1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 4,  fcvt.w.h, 0x01,          0,    -0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 5,  fcvt.w.h, 0x01,          0,     0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 6,  fcvt.w.h, 0x00,          1,     1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 7,  fcvt.w.h, 0x01,          1,     1.1, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 8,  fcvt.w.h, 0x00,      -2054, 0h:e803, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H( 9,  fcvt.w.h, 0x00,       2054, 0h:6803, rtz);

  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(12, fcvt.wu.h, 0x10,          0,    -3.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(13, fcvt.wu.h, 0x10,          0,    -1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(14, fcvt.wu.h, 0x01,          0,    -0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(15, fcvt.wu.h, 0x01,          0,     0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(16, fcvt.wu.h, 0x00,          1,     1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(17, fcvt.wu.h, 0x01,          1,     1.1, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(18, fcvt.wu.h, 0x10,          0, 0h:e803, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(19, fcvt.wu.h, 0x00,       2054, 0h:6803, rtz);

#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(22,  fcvt.l.h, 0x01,         -1,    -1.1, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(23,  fcvt.l.h, 0x00,         -1,    -1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(24,  fcvt.l.h, 0x01,          0,    -0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(25,  fcvt.l.h, 0x01,          0,     0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(26,  fcvt.l.h, 0x00,          1,     1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(27,  fcvt.l.h, 0x01,          1,     1.1, rtz);

  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(32, fcvt.lu.h, 0x10,          0,    -3.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(33, fcvt.lu.h, 0x10,          0,    -1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(34, fcvt.lu.h, 0x01,          0,    -0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(35, fcvt.lu.h, 0x01,          0,     0.9, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(36, fcvt.lu.h, 0x00,          1,     1.0, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(37, fcvt.lu.h, 0x01,          1,     1.1, rtz);
  TEST_FP_INT_OP_H(38, fcvt.lu.h, 0x10,          0, 0h:e483, rtz);
#endif

  TEST_CASE( 42, ra, 0x000000007fffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  0(ra); fcvt.w.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 43, ra, 0xffffffff80000000, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  8(ra); fcvt.w.h ra, f1)
#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_CASE( 44, ra, 0x7fffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  0(ra); fcvt.l.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 45, ra, 0x8000000000000000, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  8(ra); fcvt.l.h ra, f1)
#endif

  TEST_CASE( 52, ra, 0x000000007fffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  4(ra); fcvt.w.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 53, ra, 0x000000007fffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1, 12(ra); fcvt.w.h ra, f1)
#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_CASE( 54, ra, 0x7fffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  4(ra); fcvt.l.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 55, ra, 0x7fffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1, 12(ra); fcvt.l.h ra, f1)
#endif

  TEST_CASE( 62, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  0(ra); fcvt.wu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 63, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  4(ra); fcvt.wu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 64, ra,                  0, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  8(ra); fcvt.wu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 65, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1, 12(ra); fcvt.wu.h ra, f1)
#if __riscv_xlen >= 64
  TEST_CASE( 66, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  0(ra); fcvt.lu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 67, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  4(ra); fcvt.lu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 68, ra,                  0, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1,  8(ra); fcvt.lu.h ra, f1)
  TEST_CASE( 69, ra, 0xffffffffffffffff, la ra, tdat  ; flw f1, 12(ra); fcvt.lu.h ra, f1)
#endif

  TEST_PASSFAIL

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

tdat:
.word 0xffffffff
.word 0xffff7fff
.word 0xfffffc00
.word 0xffff7c00

RVTEST_DATA_END

#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64M
<fim_suffix>  TEST_LD_OP( 1, ld, 0, 0,  tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 2, ld, 0, 8,  tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 3, ld, 0, 16, tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 4, ld, 0, 24, tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 5, ld, 0, 32, tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 6, ld, 0, 40, tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 7, ld, 0, 48, tdat )
  TEST_LD_OP( 8, ld, 0, 56, tdat )

  j pass

  TEST_PASSFAIL

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

tdat:  .dword 0xdeadbeefdeadbeef

RVTEST_DATA_END
<fim_middle>RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  la  ra, tdat
  .word 0x0040A00F

<block_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64S
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
  #define sscratch mscratch
  #define sstatus mstatus
  #define scause mcause
  #define sepc mepc
  #define sret mret
  #define stvec_handler mtvec_handler
  #undef SSTATUS_SPP
  #define SSTATUS_SPP MSTATUS_MPP
#endif

#if __riscv_xlen == 64
#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
  li t0, MSTATUS_MPP
  csrc mstatus, t0
  csrr t1, mstatus
  and t0, t0, t1
  bnez t0, 1f
#endif
  TEST_CASE(18, a0, SSTATUS_UXL & (SSTATUS_UXL << 1), csrr a0, sstatus; li a1, SSTATUS_UXL; and a0, a0, a1)
#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
  j 2f
1:
  TEST_CASE(19, a0, 0, csrr a0, sstatus; li a1, SSTATUS_UXL; and a0, a0, a1)
2:
#endif
#endif

  TEST_CASE(20, a0,         0, csrw sscratch, zero; csrr a0, sscratch);
  TEST_CASE(21, a0,         0, csrrwi a0, sscratch, 0; csrrwi a0, sscratch, 0xF);
  TEST_CASE(22, a0,      0x1f, csrrsi zero, sscratch, 0x10; csrr a0, sscratch);
<block_end>

<task>do_scall:</task><asm>  scall
  j fail

  TEST_PASSFAIL

<eof_func>

<task>.align 2</task><asm>  .global stvec_handler
stvec_handler:
  csrr t0, scause
  csrr t2, stvec
  andi t2, t2, 2
  beqz t2, skip_mask 
  andi t0, t0, 255
<eof_func>

<task>skip_mask:</task><asm>  bne t0, t1, fail
  la t2, do_scall
  csrr t0, sepc
  bne t0, t2, fail
  j pass

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

RVTEST_DATA_END
<eof_func>

<fim_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64S
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
<fim_suffix>  #define sstatus mstatus
  #define scause mcause
  #define stvec mtvec
  #define sepc mepc
  #define sret mret
  #define stvec_handler mtvec_handler
#endif

  li TESTNUM, 2

do_break:
  sbreak
  j fail

  TEST_PASSFAIL

  .align 2
  .global stvec_handler
stvec_handler:
  li t1, CAUSE_BREAKPOINT
  csrr t0, scause
  csrr t2, stvec
  andi t2, t2, 2
  beqz t2, skip_mask 
  andi t0, t0, 255
skip_mask:
  bne t0, t1, fail
  la t1, do_break
  csrr t0, sepc
  bne t0, t1, fail
  j pass

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

RVTEST_DATA_END
<fim_middle>  #define sscratch mscratch

<fim_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64M
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  li TESTNUM, 2

  la t0, page_table_3
  srl t0, t0, RISCV_PGSHIFT - PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  ori t0, t0, PTE_V
  sd t0, page_table_2, t1

  la t0, page_table_2
  srl t0, t0, RISCV_PGSHIFT - PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  ori t0, t0, PTE_V
  sd t0, page_table_1, t1

  la t0, code_page_1
  srl t0, t0, RISCV_PGSHIFT - PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  ori t0, t0, PTE_V | PTE_X | PTE_A
  sd t0, page_table_3 + 8, t1

  la t0, code_page_2
  srl t0, t0, RISCV_PGSHIFT - PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  ori t0, t0, PTE_V | PTE_X | PTE_A
  sd t0, page_table_3 + 0, t1

  li a0, (SATP_MODE & ~(SATP_MODE<<1)) * SATP_MODE_SV39
  la a1, page_table_1
  srl a1, a1, RISCV_PGSHIFT
  or a1, a1, a0
  csrw satp, a1
  sfence.vma

  la a2, 1f
  csrwi mepc, 0
  li a1, ((MSTATUS_MPP & ~(MSTATUS_MPP<<1)) * PRV_S)
  csrs mstatus, a1
  mret

1:
  li TESTNUM, 2
  addi a0, a0, -321
  bnez a0, fail

  li TESTNUM, 3
  la a2, 1f
  li t0, RISCV_PGSIZE
  csrw mepc, t0
  mret

1:
  addi a0, a0, -123
  bnez a0, fail

  li TESTNUM, 4
  la a2, 1f
  csrwi mepc, 0
  mret

  .align 2
1:
  addi a0, a0, -321
  bnez a0, fail

  li TESTNUM, 5

  la t0, code_page_1
  srl t0, t0, RISCV_PGSHIFT - PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  ori t0, t0, PTE_V | PTE_X | PTE_A
  sd t0, page_table_3 + 0, t1
  sfence.vma

  la a2, 1f
  csrwi mepc, 0
  mret

  .align 2
1:
  addi a0, a0, -123
  bnez a0, fail

  RVTEST_PASS

  TEST_PASSFAIL

  .align 2
  .global mtvec_handler
mtvec_handler:
  csrr t0, mcause
  add t0, t0, -CAUSE_STORE_PAGE_FAULT
  bnez t0, fail

  jr a2

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

.align 12
page_table_1: .dword 0
<fim_suffix>.align 13
code_page_1:
  li a0, 123
  sw zero, (zero)
.align 12
code_page_2:
  li a0, 321
  sw zero, (zero)

RVTEST_DATA_END
<fim_middle>.align 12
page_table_2: .dword 0
.align 12
page_table_3: .dword 0

#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64S
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
  #define sscratch mscratch
  #define sstatus mstatus
  #define scause mcause
  #define stval mtval
  #define sepc mepc
  #define sret mret
  #define stvec_handler mtvec_handler
#endif

  .align 2
  .option norvc

  li TESTNUM, 2
  li t1, 0
  la t0, 1f
  jalr t1, t0, 2
1:
  .option rvc
  c.j 1f
  c.j 2f
  .option norvc
1:
  j fail
2:

  // This test should pass, since JALR ignores the target LSB
  li TESTNUM, 3
  la t0, 1f
  jalr t1, t0, 1
1:
  j 1f
  j fail
1:

  li TESTNUM, 4
  li t1, 0
  la t0, 1f
  jalr t1, t0, 3
1:
  .option rvc
  c.j 1f
  c.j 2f
  .option norvc
1:
  j fail
2:

  li TESTNUM, 5
  li t1, 0
  la t0, 1f
  jal t1, 2f
1:
  .option rvc
  c.j 1f
2:
  c.j 2f
  .option norvc
1:
  j fail
2:

  li TESTNUM, 6
  li t1, 0
  la t0, 1f
  beqz zero, 2f
1:
  .option rvc
  c.j 1f
2:
  c.j 2f
  .option norvc
1:
  j fail
2:

  li TESTNUM, 7
  bnez zero, 1f
  j 2f
  .option rvc
  c.j 1f
1:
  c.j 1f
  .option norvc
1:
  j fail
2:

#ifdef __MACHINE_MODE
  csrsi misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  csrr t2, misa
  andi t2, t2, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  beqz t2, pass

  csrci misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  csrr t2, misa
  andi t2, t2, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  bnez t2, pass

  csrr t0, mtvec
  la t1, 1f
  addi t1, t1, 2
  csrw mtvec, t1
  j 1f

  .option rvc
  c.nop
1:
  j pass
  .option norvc
2:
  csrw mtvec, t0
  csrsi misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')

  li TESTNUM, 8
  csrr t2, misa
  andi t2, t2, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  beqz t2, pass

  .option rvc
  c.nop
  csrci misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
1:
  c.nop
  .option norvc

  csrr t2, misa
  andi t2, t2, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  beqz t2, fail

  la t0, 1f
  addi t0, t0, -2
  csrw mepc, t0

  csrci misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
  li t2, MSTATUS_MPP
  csrs mstatus, t2
  mret

  beqz zero, 1f
1:
  csrsi misa, 1 << ('c' - 'a')
#endif

  j pass

  TEST_PASSFAIL

  .align 2
  .global stvec_handler
stvec_handler:
  li a0, 2
  beq TESTNUM, a0, 1f
  li a0, 4
  beq TESTNUM, a0, 1f
  li a0, 5
  beq TESTNUM, a0, 1f
  li a0, 6
  beq TESTNUM, a0, 1f
  j fail
1:

  bnez t1, fail

  li a1, CAUSE_MISALIGNED_FETCH
  csrr a0, scause
  bne a0, a1, fail

  csrr a1, sepc
  addi a1, a1, 4
  bne t0, a1, fail

  csrr a0, stval
  beqz a0, 1f
  addi a0, a0, -2
  bne a0, t0, fail
1:

  addi a1, a1, 8
  csrw sepc, a1
  sret

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

RVTEST_DATA_END

#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

#if (DRAM_BASE >> 30 << 30) != DRAM_BASE
# error This test requires DRAM_BASE be SV39 superpage-aligned
#endif 

RVTEST_RV64M
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  li a0, (SATP_MODE & ~(SATP_MODE<<1)) * SATP_MODE_SV39
  la a1, page_table_1
  srl a1, a1, RISCV_PGSHIFT
  or a1, a1, a0
  csrw satp, a1
  sfence.vma

  li a1, ((MSTATUS_MPP & ~(MSTATUS_MPP<<1)) * PRV_S) | MSTATUS_MPRV
  csrs mstatus, a1

  li TESTNUM, 2
  li t2, 1
  sw t2, dummy - DRAM_BASE, a0

  li TESTNUM, 3
  li a1, ((MSTATUS_MPP & ~(MSTATUS_MPP<<1)) * PRV_S) | MSTATUS_SUM
  csrs mstatus, a1

  lw t0, dummy - DRAM_BASE
  bnez t0, die

  sw t2, dummy - DRAM_BASE, a0

  lw t0, dummy - DRAM_BASE
  bne t0, t2, die

  li t0, MSTATUS_MPRV
  csrc mstatus, t0

  lw t0, page_table_1
  li a0, PTE_A | PTE_D
  and t0, t0, a0
  bne t0, a0, die

  li t0, MSTATUS_MPRV
  csrs mstatus, t0

  li TESTNUM, 4
  lw a0, page_table_1 - DRAM_BASE
  or a0, a0, 1 << PTE_PPN_SHIFT
  sw a0, page_table_1 - DRAM_BASE, t0
  sfence.vma
  sw a0, page_table_1 - DRAM_BASE, t0
  j die

  RVTEST_PASS

  TEST_PASSFAIL

  .align 2
  .global mtvec_handler
mtvec_handler:
  csrr t0, mcause
  add t0, t0, -CAUSE_STORE_PAGE_FAULT
  bnez t0, die

  li t1, 2
  bne TESTNUM, t1, 1f
  lw t0, page_table_1
  and t1, t0, PTE_D
  bnez t1, die
skip:
  csrr t0, mepc
  add t0, t0, 4
  csrw mepc, t0
  mret

1:
  li t1, 3
  bne TESTNUM, t1, 1f
  lw t0, page_table_1
  and t1, t0, PTE_D
  bnez t1, die
  or t0, t0, PTE_D
  sw t0, page_table_1, t1
  sfence.vma
  mret

1:
  li t1, 4
  bne TESTNUM, t1, 1f
  j pass

1:
die:
  RVTEST_FAIL

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

  TEST_DATA

.align 12
page_table_1: .dword (DRAM_BASE/RISCV_PGSIZE << PTE_PPN_SHIFT) | PTE_V | PTE_U | PTE_R | PTE_W | PTE_X | PTE_A
dummy: .dword 0

RVTEST_DATA_END

<block_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64S
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  csrc sstatus, SSTATUS_SIE
  csrs sie, SIP_SSIP
  csrs sip, SIP_SSIP
<block_end>

<fim_prefix>#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64UF
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

#include "riscv_test.h"

RVTEST_RV64U
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  .align 2
  .option push
  .option norvc

  #define RVC_TEST_CASE(n, r, v, code...) \
  TEST_CASE (n, r, v, .option push; .option rvc; code; .align 2; .option pop)

  // Make sure fetching a 4-byte instruction across a page boundary works.
  li TESTNUM, 2
  li a1, 666
  TEST_CASE (2, a1, 667, \
  j 1f; \
  .align 3; \
  data: \
  .dword 0xfedcba9876543210; \
  .dword 0xfedcba9876543210; \
  .align 12; \
  .skip 4094; \
  1: addi a1, a1, 1)

  li sp, 0x1234
  RVC_TEST_CASE (3, a0, 0x1234 + 1020, c.addi4spn a0, sp, 1020)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (4, sp, 0x1234 + 496, c.addi16sp sp, 496)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (5, sp, 0x1234 + 496 - 512, c.addi16sp sp, -512)

  la a1, data
  RVC_TEST_CASE (6, a2, 0xfffffffffedcba99, c.lw a0, 4(a1); addi a0, a0, 1; c.sw a0, 4(a1); c.lw a2, 4(a1))
#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  RVC_TEST_CASE (7, a2, 0xfedcba9976543211, c.ld a0, 0(a1); addi a0, a0, 1; c.sd a0, 0(a1); c.ld a2, 0(a1))
#endif

  RVC_TEST_CASE (8, a0, -15, ori a0, zero, 1; c.addi a0, -16)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (9, a5, -16, ori a5, zero, 1; c.li a5, -16)
#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  RVC_TEST_CASE (10, a0, 0x76543210, ld a0, (a1); c.addiw a0, -1)
#endif

  RVC_TEST_CASE (11, s0, 0xffffffffffffffe1, c.lui s0, 0xfffe1; c.srai s0, 12)
#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  RVC_TEST_CASE (12, s0, 0x000fffffffffffe1, c.lui s0, 0xfffe1; c.srli s0, 12)
#else
  RVC_TEST_CASE (12, s0, 0x000fffe1, c.lui s0, 0xfffe1; c.srli s0, 12)
#endif
  RVC_TEST_CASE (14, s0, ~0x11, c.li s0, -2; c.andi s0, ~0x10)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (15, s1, 14, li s1, 20; li a0, 6; c.sub s1, a0)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (16, s1, 18, li s1, 20; li a0, 6; c.xor s1, a0)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (17, s1, 22, li s1, 20; li a0, 6; c.or s1, a0)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (18, s1,  4, li s1, 20; li a0, 6; c.and s1, a0)
#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  RVC_TEST_CASE (19, s1, 0xffffffff80000000, li s1, 0x7fffffff; li a0, -1; c.subw s1, a0)
  RVC_TEST_CASE (20, s1, 0xffffffff80000000, li s1, 0x7fffffff; li a0, 1; c.addw s1, a0)
#endif
  RVC_TEST_CASE (21, s0, 0x12340, li s0, 0x1234; c.slli s0, 4)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (30, ra, 0, \
  li ra, 0; \
  c.j 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (31, zero, 0, \
  li a0, 0; \
  c.beqz a0, 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (32, zero, 0, \
  li a0, 1; \
  c.bnez a0, 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (33, zero, 0, \
  li a0, 1; \
  c.beqz a0, 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j fail; \
  2:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (34, zero, 0, \
  li a0, 0; \
  c.bnez a0, 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j fail; \
  2:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (35, ra, 0, \
  la t0, 1f; \
  li ra, 0; \
  c.jr t0; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:)

  RVC_TEST_CASE (36, ra, -2, \
  la t0, 1f; \
  li ra, 0; \
  c.jalr t0; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:sub ra, ra, t0)

#if __riscv_xlen == 32
  RVC_TEST_CASE (37, ra, -2, \
  la t0, 1f; \
  li ra, 0; \
  c.jal 1f; \
  c.j 2f; \
  1:c.j 1f; \
  2:j fail; \
  1:sub ra, ra, t0)
#endif

  la sp, data
  RVC_TEST_CASE (40, a2, 0xfffffffffedcba99, c.lwsp a0, 12(sp); addi a0, a0, 1; c.swsp a0, 12(sp); c.lwsp a2, 12(sp))
#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  RVC_TEST_CASE (41, a2, 0xfedcba9976543211, c.ldsp a0, 8(sp); addi a0, a0, 1; c.sdsp a0, 8(sp); c.ldsp a2, 8(sp))
#endif

  RVC_TEST_CASE (42, t0, 0x246, li a0, 0x123; c.mv t0, a0; c.add t0, a0)

  .option pop

  TEST_PASSFAIL

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .data
RVTEST_DATA_BEGIN

RVTEST_DATA_END

  TEST_CASE(n, a0, 0x12345678 | (-(new_sign) << 31), \
  li a1, ((rs1_sign) << 31) | 0x12345678; \
  li a2, -(rs2_sign); \
  fmv.s.x f1, a1; \
  fmv.s.x f2, a2; \
  insn f0, f1, f2; \
  fmv.x.s a0, f0)

  TEST_FSGNJS(10, fsgnj.s, 0, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(11, fsgnj.s, 1, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(12, fsgnj.s, 0, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(13, fsgnj.s, 1, 1, 1)

  TEST_FSGNJS(20, fsgnjn.s, 1, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(21, fsgnjn.s, 0, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(22, fsgnjn.s, 1, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(23, fsgnjn.s, 0, 1, 1)

  TEST_FSGNJS(30, fsgnjx.s, 0, 0, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(31, fsgnjx.s, 1, 0, 1)
  TEST_FSGNJS(32, fsgnjx.s, 1, 1, 0)
  TEST_FSGNJS(33, fsgnjx.s, 0, 1, 1)

  TEST_PASSFAIL

bltu a1, a3, 1b

)

la a0, foo
li a1, 1<<LOG_ITERATIONS
addi a2, a2, 1
1: lr.w a4, (a0)
add a4, a4, a2
sc.w a4, a4, (a0)
bnez a4, 1b
addi a1, a1, -1
bnez a1, 1b

la a0, barrier
li a1, 1
amoadd.w zero, a1, (a0)
1: lw a1, (a0)
blt a1, a3, 1b
fence

TEST_CASE( 5, a0, 0, \
  lw a0, foo; \
  slli a1, a3, LOG_ITERATIONS-1; \
1:sub a0, a0, a1; \
  addi a3, a3, -1; \
  bgez a3, 1b
)

  la a0, foo; \
1:lr.w a1, (a0); \
  sc.w a1, zero, (a0); \
  bnez a1, 1b; \
  sc.w a1, zero, (a0); \
  \
  sc.w a2, zero, (a0); \
  add a1, a1, a2
)

TEST_PASSFAIL

#include "riscv_test.h"
#include "test_macros.h"

RVTEST_RV64M
RVTEST_CODE_BEGIN

  li TESTNUM, 1

  csrw pmpcfg0, zero
  li t0, -1
  csrw pmpaddr0, t0
  csrr t0, pmpaddr0

  neg t1, t0
  and a7, t0, t1

  beqz a7, fail
  srl a7, a7, 1
  beqz a7, pass

#define PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK a7
#define PMPCFG_A_MASK (0x3 << 3)

.macro set_pmpaddr_bit value
.if \value
  csrs pmpaddr0, PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK
.else
  csrc pmpaddr0, PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK
.endif
.endm

.macro set_mode_off
  csrc pmpcfg0, PMPCFG_A_MASK
.endm

.macro set_mode_napot
  csrs pmpcfg0, PMPCFG_A_MASK
.endm

.macro check_pmpaddr_bit expected_value
  li TESTNUM, (2 + \@)
  csrr t6, pmpaddr0
  and t6, t6, PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK
.if \expected_value
  beqz t6, fail
.else
  bnez t6, fail
.endif
.endm

.macro check_pmpaddr_bit_clear
  csrr t6, pmpaddr0
  and t6, t6, PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK
  bnez t6, fail
.endm

  set_mode_napot
  set_pmpaddr_bit 0
  check_pmpaddr_bit 0
  set_pmpaddr_bit 1
  check_pmpaddr_bit 1
  set_mode_off
  check_pmpaddr_bit 0
  set_mode_napot
  check_pmpaddr_bit 1

  set_pmpaddr_bit 0
  set_mode_off
  set_pmpaddr_bit 1
  set_mode_napot
  check_pmpaddr_bit 1

  set_mode_off
  csrc pmpaddr0, zero
  csrs pmpaddr0, zero
  set_mode_napot
  check_pmpaddr_bit 1

  set_mode_off
  not t0, PMPADDR_Gm1_MASK
  csrs pmpaddr0, t0
  set_mode_napot
  check_pmpaddr_bit 0

  j pass

  TEST_PASSFAIL

  .align 2
  .global mtvec_handler
mtvec_handler:
  j fail

RVTEST_CODE_END

  .align 2

  li s2, CAUSE_LOAD_ACCESS

#define SEXT(x, n) ((-((x) >> ((n)-1)) << (n)) | ((x) & ((1 << (n))-1)))

#define MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(testnum, insn, base, offset, res) \
  li TESTNUM, testnum; \
  la t2, 1f; \
  addi t1, base, offset; \
  insn t1, offset(base); \
  li t2, res; \
  bne t1, t2, fail; \
1:

  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(2,  lh,  s0, 1, SEXT(0xbbcc, 16))
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(3,  lhu, s0, 1, 0xbbcc)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(4,  lw,  s0, 1, SEXT(0x99aabbcc, 32))
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(5,  lw,  s0, 2, SEXT(0x8899aabb, 32))
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(6,  lw,  s0, 3, SEXT(0x778899aa, 32))

#if __riscv_xlen == 64
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(7,  lwu, s0, 1, 0x99aabbcc)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(8,  lwu, s0, 2, 0x8899aabb)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(9,  lwu, s0, 3, 0x778899aa)

  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(10, ld, s0, 1, 0x5566778899aabbcc)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(11, ld, s0, 2, 0x445566778899aabb)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(12, ld, s0, 3, 0x33445566778899aa)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(13, ld, s0, 4, 0x2233445566778899)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(14, ld, s0, 5, 0x1122334455667788)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(15, ld, s0, 6, 0xee11223344556677)
  MISALIGNED_LOAD_TEST(16, ld, s0, 7, 0xffee112233445566)
#endif

  li s1, CAUSE_MISALIGNED_STORE
  li s2, CAUSE_STORE_ACCESS

#define MISALIGNED_STORE_TEST(testnum, insn, base, offset, size) \
  li TESTNUM, testnum; \
  la t2, 1f; \
  addi t1, base, offset; \
  insn zero, offset(base); \
  lb t1, (offset - 1)(base); \
  beqz t1, fail; \
  lb t1, (offset + size)(base); \
  beqz t1, fail; \
  lb t1, (offset + 0)(base); \
  bnez t1, fail; \
  lb t1, (offset + size - 1)(base); \
  bnez t1, fail; \

#define get_field(reg, mask) (((reg) & (mask)) / ((mask) & ~((mask) << 1)))
#define set_field(reg, mask, val) (((reg) & ~(mask)) | (((val) * ((mask) & ~((mask) << 1))) & (mask)))

  .global main
  .global main_end
  .global main_post_csrr

  // Load constants into all registers so we can test no register are
  // clobbered after attaching.
main:
  SREG    ra, 0(sp)
  addi    sp, sp, REGBYTES

  // Set VS=1
  csrr    t0, CSR_MSTATUS
  li      t1, set_field(0, MSTATUS_VS, 1)
  or      t0, t0, t1
  csrw    CSR_MSTATUS, t0

  // copy a to b
  la      a0, a
  jal     vector_load_v4
  la      a0, b
  jal     shift_store_v4

  // assert a == b
  la      a0, a
  la      a1, b
  jal     check_equal
test0:
  bne     a0, zero, return_from_main

  // copy b to c
  la      a0, b
  jal     shift_load_v4
  la      a0, c
  jal     vector_store_v4

  // assert b == c
  la      a0, b
  la      a1, c
  jal     check_equal
test1:
  bne     a0, zero, return_from_main

return_from_main:
  addi    sp, sp, -REGBYTES
  LREG    ra, 0(sp)
  ret

vector_load_v4:
  // a0: point to memory to load from
  csrr    s0, vlenb
  vsetvli zero, s0, e8, m1
  vle8.v v4, 0(a0)
  ret

vector_store_v4:
  // a0: point to memory to store to
  csrr    s0, vlenb
  vsetvli zero, s0, e8, m1
  vse8.v v4, 0(a0)
  ret

shift_load_v4:
  // a0: pointer to memory to load from

  // Configure all elements in the chain
  csrr    s0, vlenb
#if XLEN == 32
  vsetvli zero, s0, e32
#else
  vsetvli zero, s0, e64
#endif

  // Figure out how long the chain is.
  csrr    s0, vlenb
  li      s1, XLEN/8
  divu    s0, s0, s1

1:
  LREG    s2, 0(a0)
  vslide1down.vx  v4, v4, s2
  addi    a0, a0, REGBYTES
  addi    s0, s0, -1
  bne     s0, zero, 1b

  ret

shift_store_v4:
  // a0: pointer to memory to store to

  // Configure all elements in the chain
  csrr    s0, vlenb
#if XLEN == 32
  vsetvli zero, s0, e32
#else
  vsetvli zero, s0, e64
#endif

  // Figure out how long the chain is.
  csrr    s0, vlenb
  li      s1, XLEN/8
  divu    s0, s0, s1

1:
  vmv.x.s s2, v4
  SREG    s2, 0(a0)
  vslide1down.vx  v4, v4, s2
  addi    a0, a0, REGBYTES
  addi    s0, s0, -1
  bne     s0, zero, 1b

  ret

check_equal:
  csrr    s0, vlenb
1:
  lb      s1, 0(a0)
  lb      s2, 0(a1)
  bne     s1, s2, 2f
  addi    a0, a0, 1
  addi    a1, a1, 1
  addi    s0, s0, -1
  bne     s0, zero, 1b
  li      a0, 0   // equal
  ret
2:      // unequal
  li      a0, 1
  ret

_start:

handle_reset:
  // If misa doesn't exist (or is following an old spec where it has a
  // different number), skip the next block.
  la t0, 3f
  csrw mtvec, t0
  csrwi mstatus, 0

  // make sure these registers exist by seeing if either S or U bits
  // are set before attempting to zero them out.
  csrr   t1, misa
  addi   t2, zero, 1 	
  slli   t2, t2, 20 // U_EXTENSION
  and    t2, t1, t2
  bne    zero, t2, 1f
  addi   t2, zero, 1
  slli   t2, t2, 18 // S_EXTENSION	
  and    t2, t1, t2
  bne    zero, t2, 1f
  j 2f

2:

  la t0, trap_entry

  csrw  CSR_TSELECT, t0

  csrr  t1, CSR_TSELECT
  beq   t0, t1, 1b
.p2align 2

  csrwi mstatus, 0

  bge   t0, t1, 2f
  sb    zero, 0(t0)
  addi  t0, t0, 1
  j     1b
